name: Tiller of the Cursed Ground
oracleText:
When Tiller of the Cursed Ground enters the battlefield, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.
When a land enters the battlefield under your control, Tiller of the Cursed Ground gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
flavorText: "Cursed is the ground for thy sake; in sorrow shalt thou eat of it all the days of thy life." — Genesis 3:17
notes: Early World supporting role card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Adam tilling the ground.
